overrides.expect: \gamma (a _ {i}) \equiv \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 \otimes a _ {i} & \text { if   i   is   not   of   the   form   2^{r} -1} \\ \xi_ {r} \otimes 1 + 1 \otimes a _ {2 ^ {r} - 1} & \text { if   i = 2^{r} -1}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \gamma (a _ {i}) \equiv \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 \otimes a _ {i} & \text { if   i   is   not   of   the   form } 2^{r} -1 \\ \xi_ {r} \otimes 1 + 1 \otimes a _ {2 ^ {r} - 1} & \text { if } i = 2^{r} -1. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{c c c} F (X, Y) \wedge F (X, Z) \wedge X \wedge X & \xrightarrow {t \wedge \mathrm{id}} & F (X, Z) \wedge F (X, Y) \wedge X \wedge X \\ \Big \downarrow_ {\mathrm{id} \wedge t \wedge \mathrm{id}} & & \Big \downarrow_ {\mathrm{id} \wedge \varepsilon \wedge \mathrm{id}} \\ F (X, Y) \wedge X \wedge F (X, Z) \wedge X & & F (X, Z) \wedge Y \wedge X \\ \Big \downarrow_ {\varepsilon \wedge \varepsilon} & & \Big \downarrow_ {\mathrm{id} \wedge t} \\ Y \wedge Z \xleftarrow [ t ] & Z \wedge Y \xleftarrow [ \varepsilon \wedge \mathrm{id} ] & F (X, Z) \wedge X \wedge Y. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{c c c} F (X, Y) \wedge F (X, Z) \wedge X \wedge X & \xrightarrow {t \wedge \mathrm{id}} & F (X, Z) \wedge F (X, Y) \wedge X \wedge X \\ \Big \downarrow_ {\mathrm{id} \wedge t \wedge \mathrm{id}} & & \Big \downarrow_ {\mathrm{id} \wedge \varepsilon \wedge \mathrm{id}} \\ F (X, Y) \wedge X \wedge F (X, Z) \wedge X & & F (X, Z) \wedge Y \wedge X \\ \Big \downarrow_ {\varepsilon \wedge \varepsilon} & & \Big \downarrow_ {\mathrm{id} \wedge t} \\ Y \wedge Z \xleftarrow { t } & Z \wedge Y \xleftarrow { \varepsilon \wedge \mathrm{id} } & F (X, Z) \wedge X \wedge Y. \end{array}
